---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for Agently
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want to see.

## Problem or opportunity

What problem would this solve, or what workflow would it improve?

## Proposed solution

Describe your ideal solution or user experience.

## Alternatives considered

List any alternative solutions, workarounds, or approaches you have considered.

## Additional context

Add mockups, examples, links, or supporting details that would help shape the request.
